summary_one_line: A well-formed DTD-bearing XML doc whose attribute value reaches the old-XML-1.0 name-char check at valid.c:3573 with a letter/digit char

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid XML document carrying a DOCTYPE with a SYSTEM-referenced DTD plus element/attribute markup (e.g. <!DOCTYPE...SYSTEM "dtds/...dtd">...<a><b xlink:f="">), so an attribute declaration's value is parsed and routed into xmlValidateNmtokens/Name/AttributeValueInternal, calling xmlIsDocNameChar with a real name character on the doc->properties XML_DOC_OLD10 path.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Grimoire winner seeds are short, well-formed XML where a clean <?l ?> declaration, <!DOCTYPEa SYSTEM "dtds/127772.dtd"> and concrete element/attribute markup <a><b xlink:f=""> reach the validation call chain; the generalization+structural-recombination stage assembles and preserves this nested grammar structure so the attribute value feeds xmlIsDocNameChar with the true branch taken (W shows L3573 T=123).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Cmplog loser seeds carry a leading filename/garbage prefix (e.g. 127772.xml\n or 06 00 06 00 00 00 31 32 37 37 37 32 ...) before the <?xml version="1.0"?> declaration, so the document is malformed earlier and the attribute value path that reaches the true side fires far less often (L shows L3573 T=30); havoc/I2S byte substitution does not reliably build the nested DOCTYPE+element grammar that grimoire structural mutation does.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and the Grimoire structural mutators (GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator, GrimoireExtensionMutator) splice/recurse on those generalized token structures, enabling grammar-free assembly of the nested DOCTYPE+element document that cmplog (I2S byte substitution only) cannot synthesize.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Byte content that progressively matches the multi-clause comparison cascade routing into the validation path (DOCTYPE/SYSTEM keyword bytes and the attribute-type switch), so the input is rewarded for partial matches toward reaching xmlIsDocNameChar's true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets so partial-match progress on the string/integer comparisons along the chain (switch type at xmlValidateAttributeValueInternal L3865, name-char clauses) is retained as new feedback, letting the fuzzer climb toward the true side and resolve in 8/10 trials (winner: resolved=8/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Plain cmplog has no CMP_MAP gradient signal — only edge buckets plus I2S substitution — so it gets no credit for partial progress on the comparison cascade and stalls blocked in 9/10 trials (loser: resolved=1/10 blocked=9) with far fewer true-branch hits (avg hitcount on branch: winner=99 loser=8).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance feedback buckets) rewards inputs for partial comparison matches along the validation chain, giving the fuzzer a smooth climb toward the name-char true branch that plain cmplog's binary edge feedback does not provide.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of the name-char test on the old-XML-1.0 else path inside xmlIsDocNameChar.
Reaching the blocker requires the doc->properties old-10 path (else branch).
The blocker is reached via attribute-value validation calling xmlIsDocNameChar.
Grimoire winner seeds are well-formed XML with a SYSTEM DTD and element/attribute markup.
Grimoire winner seeds contain concrete element/attribute markup reaching the validation chain.
Grimoire winner seeds are produced by Grimoire structural mutators.
Grimoire's generalization+structural mutators recombine generalized token structures.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

evidence_trail.claim: Cmplog loser seeds carry a leading filename/garbage prefix before the XML declaration.
Grimoire winner resolved every trial while cmplog loser blocked in 9/10.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: The winner takes the true side far more often than the loser at the blocker line.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L3573  T=123 F=387  T=30 F=192  if ((IS_LETTER(c)) || (IS_DIGIT(c)) ||  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets on top of cmplog.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
union of cmplog and value_profile — edge counters,
per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog feedback includes CMP_MAP-bucket signals absent in plain cmplog.
Plain cmplog feedback is only the same edge-bucket signal as naive.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
same edge-bucket signal as naive. The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog resolved 8/10 while cmplog blocked 9/10 with much higher branch hitcount.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=99  loser=8

evidence_trail.claim: The comparison cascade includes the attribute-type switch routing toward the validation call.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L3865  T=0 F=84  T=0 F=285  switch (type) {

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Decisive pairs are grimoire>cmplog (grimoire_structural) and value_profile_cmplog>cmplog (value_profile); neither winner mechanism is I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory I2S lineage check does not apply. Pair 1's claimed mechanism is grimoire structural, corroborated directly by the winner seed metadata mutation_op=GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator,GrimoireExtensionMutator in BRANCH SEEDS rather than by a lineage dash-row query.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where cmplog (no grimoire structural stage, no CMP_MAP) resolves the old-XML-1.0 name-char true branch as often as grimoire/value_profile_cmplog, showing structural recombination and gradient feedback give no advantage at building the nested DOCTYPE+element document.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the XML_DOC_OLD10 else-path requirement is genuinely the discriminator versus simple document well-formedness is inferred from source plus seed shape, not directly proven by a per-role branch hit on line 3547.
